'''Panatha''', also known as '''Epicanthix'''<ref name="SOTESB">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> was a [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Pacanth Reach/Legends|Pacanth Reach]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Epicanthix]]. It was close to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], the panathan [[Flower/Legends|flower]] - which was considered extinct for centuries - started to bloom again on the world.<ref name="Mission" />

During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Yun's father|father]] of [[Epicanthix]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Yun]] was a prosperous [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] [[Baron/Legends|baron]] on Panatha before his [[Death/Legends|death]] at the hand of his son and the seizure of his assets by [[Sariss]], the baron's fiancé and Yun's mentor in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the force]].<ref name="Dark Forces">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050512b|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 3: Pride of the Dark Side}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
